name: @law-firm-os/desktop
description: mater desktop shell package. P1 skeleton only; no file bridge, auth token storage, or update channel is exposed.

scripts.test:file-bridge: node --test test/file-bridge.test.mjs test/file-picker-gesture.test.mjs test/file-upload-bridge.test.mjs test/file-save-as.test.mjs test/temp-preview-cleanup.test.mjs && cd ../.. && node scripts/validate-desktop-file-bridge-contract.mjs && node scripts/validate-mater-desktop-file-bridge.mjs
